patient_profile.name: Monica Harris
patient_profile.lifestyle_summary: Middle-income suburban lifestyle, college student with moderate activity levels; history of former smoking and heavy alcohol use. Diet primarily high in salt.
patient_profile.past_medical_history: Mild gastritis treated with antacids in the past; no other chronic conditions reported.
patient_profile.family_history: Mother diagnosed with depression; father had hypertension; sibling with history of unspecified anxiety symptoms.
patient_profile.medication_history: No current medications. Previously on oral contraceptives; stopped due to personal preference.
patient_profile.allergy_history: No known drug or environmental allergies.
patient_profile.vaccination_history: Up-to-date on recommended adult vaccinations including influenza, Tdap, and COVID-19.

symptom_trajectory.chief_complaint: I can't stop worrying about everything, and it's been making it hard for me to sleep or focus on schoolwork.
symptom_trajectory.progression: Symptoms worsened over time, especially with increased academic and personal demands.

selected_symptoms.name: Persistent worry, fear, tension, restlessness, or feeling on edge
selected_symptoms.impact: Interrupts focus and tasks related to academic studies and personal errands.

selected_symptoms.name: Difficulty concentrating, fatigue, irritability, and sleep disturbance
selected_symptoms.impact: Difficulty completing coursework and repeatedly feeling unrested despite sleeping attempts.

selected_symptoms.name: Avoidance of feared activities, social situations, places, objects, or routines
selected_symptoms.impact: Stopped attending study groups and avoids social gatherings due to fear of judgment.

associated_symptoms: Periodic chest discomfort without cardiac symptoms
negative_symptoms: No syncope or medical danger symptoms
symptom_trajectory.functional_impact: Decreased academic performance and social withdrawal, though still able to manage basic daily tasks independently.
risk_features: No urgent psychiatric or medical risks identified.
